title_pl: Liczba termów EML to liczba Catalana
title_en: Count of EMLTerms equals the Catalan number
paper_section: §4.2 Elementary functions as binary trees ('Catalan structures')
paper_quote: Context-free language; isomorphic to full binary trees / Catalan structures.
informal_pl: Liczba pełnych drzew binarnych z n liśćmi (= n+1 wewnętrznych krawędzi) to liczba Catalana C_n. Indukcyjnie: liczba EMLTerm-ów rozmiaru 2k+1 wynosi C_k. Mathlib zawiera Nat.catalan.
informal_en: The number of full binary trees with n leaves is the Catalan number C_{n−1}. By induction, the count of EMLTerms of size 2k+1 is C_k. Mathlib has `Nat.catalan`.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm_count_catalan (k : ℕ) : (Finset.univ.filter (fun t : EMLTerm => EMLTerm.size t = 2 * k + 1)).card = Nat.catalan k := by sorry
notes: Requires a Fintype (or DecidableEq) instance on EMLTerm. The Finset.univ.filter approach assumes Fintype, which requires bounding terms by size — a separate small chunk we skip. Aristotle will likely need `sorry` here.
